enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Ready Readya is a lively celebration of joy and excitement, perfect for festive occasions.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Mappillai, the song captures a festive moment, showcasing the characters' happiness and energy during celebrations.

Who are the singers and music director?

The song features the talented voices of Ranjith and Saindhavi, with music composed by Mani Sharma.

When was the song released?

Ready Readya was released on March 15, 2011.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Ready Readya from Mappillai is a vibrant and energetic dance number that perfectly encapsulates the joy of celebration. With its catchy beats and playful lyrics, it evokes feelings of happiness and excitement, making it an ideal choice for weddings and parties. The lively collaboration between Ranjith and Saindhavi adds to the song's charm, inviting listeners to join in the fun. Overall, it conveys a sense of carefree joy that resonates with audiences.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ready Readya from Mappillai is an electrifying duet that brings together the vibrant voices of Ranjith and Saindhavi. With Mani Sharma's catchy composition and Snehan's playful lyrics, this song is sure to get you on your feet. Experience the infectious energy and joyful vibes that make this track a perfect addition to any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: Ready, ready, ready, ready, ahhhhhhh, ready, ready, ready, ready.
The dance of the goat and tiger is here. Let's go and enjoy. The goat has won here, so watch out, uncle. Now, the king will play. There’s no need for anything else, just enjoy the fun.
The dance of the goat and tiger is here. Let's go and enjoy. The goat has won here, so watch out, uncle. Now, the king will play. There’s no need for anything else, just enjoy the fun.
It's a common day, three times I will eat from now on. Ready, ready, ready...
It's a common day, four legs on a bed for you. Ready, ready, ready...
On the day of the wedding, whatever happens, I will catch you. I will take you, my dear.
The dance of the goat and tiger is here...
I will go as a tiger, don't stop me. If you are there, nothing will happen. Ready, ready, ready...
Even if I am tough, don't feel bad. Even if I leave, it’s not wrong. Ready, ready, ready...
The gossip is spreading, the food is being served. Don't close the door, come and enjoy my wishes.
Ready, ready, ready, ready, ahahahhhhhh... Ready, ready, ready, ready.
